title: BEAM Therapeutics Q4 2025 Earnings and Strategic Updates
text: Beam Therapeutics reported Q4 and full year 2025 earnings with net income of $244.3 million ($2.37 per basic share) in Q4 2025 driven by increased collaboration revenue. Full year net loss was $80.0 million ($0.81 per share). Cash position of $1.25 billion at year-end provided strong financial runway into mid-2029. R&D expenses for full year 2025 were $409.6 million. G&A expenses were $113.8 million for full year. The company emphasized strategic priorities focused on advancing late-stage clinical programs including risto-cel commercialization, BEAM-302 pivotal development, and BEAM-304 pipeline expansion. Sixth Street partnership provided long-term non-dilutive capital to support anticipated risto-cel launch and precision genetic medicine development. Company positioned for potential regulatory and commercialization milestones in 2026 including risto-cel BLA submission, BEAM-302 pivotal cohort initiation, and BEAM-304 IND filing.
